rulings.Case Title: CHARLES GILPIN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendant The Goodyear Tire Rubber Company'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, March 6, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of defendant The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Co.¿s person most knowledgeable and custodian of records and request for sanctions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
